2026-04-02T14:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR), with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2026-04-02T14:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2026-04-02T17:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR): The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2026-04-02T17:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2026-04-02T17:35:00.CONTENT_EN:
A new train timetable of HSR will take effect from 15 April 2026. You may check the latest train information on the HSR website (timetable) or mobile app. 

To facilitate the timetable adjustment, ticket sales for some train trips will be slightly deferred. For the latest ticketing arrangements and ticket purchase, please visit the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app.
2026-04-02T17:35:00.CONTENT_CN:
新的高速鐵路列車時間表將於2026年4月15日起生效。你可瀏覽高速鐵路網頁(時間表)或手機應用程式，查閱最新列車資訊。

為配合時間表調整，部分列車車票的開售時間將稍為延後。你可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式購票，並留意車票開售情況。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 機場管理局 早上繁忙時段

2026-04-03T05:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to heavy traffic at the road section leading from Airport Road to Hong Kong International Airport’s Terminal 1 Departures Kerb, motorists are advised to use the drop-off area at the Airport’s Car Park 1. Members of the public heading to the Airport are advised to allow sufficient time for their journey and consider taking the Airport Express and buses.
2026-04-03T05:50:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時機場路通往香港國際機場一號客運大樓離港層落客區的路段交通繁忙，駕駛人士請考慮改用機場一號停車場落客區。前往機場的市民，請預留足夠交通時間，並考慮乘搭機場快綫或巴士。

2026-04-03T07:15:00.CONTENT_EN: The following road section(s) are busy: - Lin Cheung Road (Hong Kong West Kowloon Station bound) - Jordan Road (Hong Kong West Kowloon Station bound) Motorists passing through the above road section(s) are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2026-04-03T07:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下路段的交通繁忙: -連翔道(往香港西九龍站方向） -佐敦道(往香港西九龍站方向） 駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2026-04-03T08:11:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic at the following road sections have resumed normal:
- Lin Cheung Road (Hong Kong West Kowloon Station bound)
- Jordan Road (Hong Kong West Kowloon Station bound).
2026-04-03T08:11:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
-連翔道(往香港西九龍站方向）
-佐敦道(往香港西九龍站方向）。

2026-04-03T15:35:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2026-04-03T15:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。

2026-04-04T11:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-04-04T11:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-04-04T12:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Hong Kong West Kowloon Station Public Car Park is now full. Please use public transport to reach the station.
2026-04-04T12:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 香港西九龍站公眾停車場現已泊滿。請使用公共交通工具前往。
